entries.prompt: A detailed Alpine mountain landscape with snow-capped peaks, dense pine forests, a wooden chalet, and a lake reflection. Black and white line drawing. Clean outlines on pure white background. Intricate detailed patterns, fine lines. No shading, no text.

Rolling Provencal lavender fields with a stone farmhouse, cypress trees, and distant hills under a sunny sky. Black and white line drawing. Clean outlines on pure white background. Intricate detailed patterns, fine lines. No shading, no text.

A dramatic Brittany coastline with rocky cliffs, crashing waves, a lighthouse, and seabirds soaring in the sky. Black and white line drawing. Clean outlines on pure white background. Intricate detailed patterns, fine lines. No shading, no text.
